name: kricketune
flavor_texts: It crosses its knifelike arms in front of its chest when it cries. It can compose melodies ad lib.
It signals its emotions with its melodies. Scientists are studying these melodic patterns.
There is a village that hosts a contest based on the amazingly variable cries of this Pokémon.
By allowing its cry to resonate in the hollow of its belly, it produces a captivating sound.
It uses its cutlass-like arms to produce sound, the melody of which varies from individual to individual. It is a worthwhile endeavor to seek out one's favorite tunes.
text: Kricketune is the Cricket Pokémon. It is a bug-type Pokémon. Abilities: swarm, technician (hidden). Base stats — HP: 77, Attack: 85, Defense: 51, Sp. Atk: 55, Sp. Def: 51, Speed: 65. Evolution line: kricketot → kricketune. Lore: It crosses its knifelike arms in front of its chest when it cries. It can compose melodies ad lib. It signals its emotions with its melodies. Scientists are studying these melodic patterns. There is a village that hosts a contest based on the amazingly variable cries of this Pokémon. By allowing its cry to resonate in the hollow of its belly, it produces a captivating sound. It uses its cutlass-like arms to produce sound, the melody of which varies from individual to individual. It is a worthwhile endeavor to seek out one's favorite tunes.
